headline: Run your business on one platform
subheadline: Vertext brings your content, team, and operations together in a single, dependable workspace.

items.title: Unified Workspace
items.text: Manage content, users, and permissions from a single admin console.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.text: Role-based access control and audit logging built in from day one.

items.title: Actionable Insights
items.text: Understand what matters with clear, built-in reporting.

headline: Ready to get started?
text: Set up your workspace in minutes, no credit card required.
